office_does: The auditor administers elections, recording, licensing, and county financial processes.
race_blurb: Appointed auditor Sheryl Park faces former commissioner Gregory Tompkins and finance and management professionals Marjorie Denton Sanborn and Tim Reeves.

candidates.summary: Tompkins is a former 16-year county commissioner and longtime business manager emphasizing modernization, accessibility, cost-effectiveness, and transparency.
highlights: Served 16 years as county commissioner and has four decades of management experience [S2].
Emphasizes process modernization, accessibility, cost-effectiveness, and transparency [S2].

spending.basis: Cost-effectiveness, integrity, and process modernization support an accountability direction.

experience.basis: Sixteen years in county office plus four decades of management establish a maximal proven record.

candidates.summary: Sanborn has program-management, business, and nonprofit-finance experience and previously sought the auditor's office.
highlights: Has program-management, business, and nonprofit-finance experience [S2].

experience.basis: Her relevant management and finance record is substantial but not direct auditor-office service.

candidates.summary: Park is the appointed incumbent auditor and a federally licensed tax professional with accounting and financial experience.
highlights: Has tax, accounting, and financial experience [S2].

experience.basis: Appointed incumbency and relevant financial work support a proven record, though the dossier does not establish long tenure.

candidates.summary: Reeves is an economist and finance consultant with major-company change-management and local board experience who emphasizes reporting accuracy and accountability.
highlights: Has economics, finance-consulting, change-management, and local board experience [S2].
Emphasizes timely expense reporting, accountability, records accuracy, and organizational improvement [S2].

spending.basis: His priorities center on accurate expense reporting, accountability, and organizational improvement.

experience.basis: His finance and management record is relevant but not direct auditor-office service.
